# Unicode and right-to-left text

Mixed scripts and directions should render without breaking layout.

## Right-to-left

Arabic: مرحبا بالعالم — this is a full RTL paragraph.

Hebrew: שלום עולם — another RTL paragraph.

Mixed: The word مرحبا means "hello" and שלום also means "peace" in English text.

## Wide and combining characters

CJK: 日本語のテキスト 中文文本 한국어 텍스트

Emoji: 🚀 👍 😀 🇩🇪 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Combining: e + ́ = é, a + ̈ = ä

## In a table

| Language | Greeting | Note |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Arabic | مرحبا | RTL |
| Hebrew | שלום | RTL |
| Japanese | こんにちは | wide |
| Emoji | 🚀👍 | symbols |
